attacking_style: Favors very late attacks (1-1.5km to go) after policing breakaways all day, using superior patience and freshness management. Waits until finale rather than committing early on climbs.
team_tactics: Functions tactically for family/team goals—willing to sacrifice own energy staying barely clear to shield brother Ion from chase work. Less dependent on domestique support, operates autonomously in breaks.
terrain_preference: Strong on medium mountains and uphill finishes with sprint capability. Handles stage race climbing well enough for GC positioning (top 3 overall), but not explosive on punchy terrain.
vulnerability: Susceptible to being dropped on sustained pace climbs even when not described as punishing. Descending/positioning under pressure is questionable (crashed on final climb). Slow to find form early in stage races.
key_patterns: Attacks with 1-1.5km remaining after policing breakaways, superior late-race freshness management (2 observations)
Takes 10+ kilometers to warm into stage races, stronger on second/later days (2 observations)
Tactically sacrifices own position for brother Ion's benefit in races (2 observations)
Gets dropped on sustained climbing pace earlier than GC ambitions suggest (2 observations)
Possesses strong uphill sprint capability unusual for GC-oriented rider (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2020 showed tactical intelligence but in pure domestique role; 2019 stage win demonstrated peak form; 2018 mixed with early-season weaknesses but mid-race improvement pattern
